# OpenCode Audio Assets

The MP3 files in this folder are sourced from the OpenCode project:

https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/tree/dev/packages/ui/src/assets/audio

OpenCode is licensed under the MIT License.

Copyright (c) 2025 opencode

The files copied here are the MP3 versions of every OpenCode UI sound effect:

- alert-01.mp3
- alert-02.mp3
- alert-03.mp3
- alert-04.mp3
- alert-05.mp3
- alert-06.mp3
- alert-07.mp3
- alert-08.mp3
- alert-09.mp3
- alert-10.mp3
- bip-bop-01.mp3
- bip-bop-02.mp3
- bip-bop-03.mp3
- bip-bop-04.mp3
- bip-bop-05.mp3
- bip-bop-06.mp3
- bip-bop-07.mp3
- bip-bop-08.mp3
- bip-bop-09.mp3
- bip-bop-10.mp3
- nope-01.mp3
- nope-02.mp3
- nope-03.mp3
- nope-04.mp3
- nope-05.mp3
- nope-06.mp3
- nope-07.mp3
- nope-08.mp3
- nope-09.mp3
- nope-10.mp3
- nope-11.mp3
- nope-12.mp3
- staplebops-01.mp3
- staplebops-02.mp3
- staplebops-03.mp3
- staplebops-04.mp3
- staplebops-05.mp3
- staplebops-06.mp3
- staplebops-07.mp3
- yup-01.mp3
- yup-02.mp3
- yup-03.mp3
- yup-04.mp3
- yup-05.mp3
- yup-06.mp3

They are used as local UI sound effects for the OpenCode-style Verbeam workbench.
